description_long: This is a robust, cylindrical fire hydrant painted in a weathered reddish-brown color, featuring a domed top with a prominent operating nut or cap. The hydrant has two side outlets and one front-facing outlet, each capped and secured with metal chains to prevent loss. The surface shows signs of wear, with patches of paint chipping and metallic sheen visible in some areas, suggesting exposure to the elements. The base is wide and flanged, bolted to the ground for stability, and the overall construction appears to be heavy-duty cast metal. The chains dangle loosely from the caps, adding to the utilitarian appearance. No manufacturer or model markings are visible on the exterior.
description: A weathered reddish-brown fire hydrant with three capped outlets and dangling chains, mounted on a flanged base. The surface is chipped and metallic, giving it a rugged, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main outlet with a cap and chain, flanked by two side outlets and a domed top.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the right outlet and the chain attached to its cap, with the front outlet partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying both side outlets symmetrically, with the front outlet hidden and the domed top centered.
description_view_3: Angled side view from the left, showing the left outlet and its chain, with the front outlet partially visible.
